title: Post-Call Processing & Webhooks
lede: Turn every call into structured output: generate a summary, score success, extract custom JSON data, and POST it all to your systems - configured in the Webhooks Post Processing panel.

steps.title: Open Webhooks Post Processing
steps.content:
1. Go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents and open your agent.
  2. Open the Webhooks Post Processing panel. Its sections are Server URL & Events, Summary, Success Evaluation, and Structured Data.

images.caption: The Webhooks Post Processing panel: server URL, summary, success evaluation, and structured data.
The Webhooks Post Processing panel: server URL, summary, success evaluation, and structured data.

steps.title: Set the Server URL and Events
steps.content:
1. In Server URL & Events, enter the URL that should receive the call data via HTTP POST.
  2. Tick the events to send - for example summary, transcript, status updates, tool calls, structured data, and success evaluation.

images.caption: Post-call results are sent automatically when the call ends.
Post-call results are sent automatically when the call ends.

steps.title: Summary and Success Evaluation
steps.content:
• Summary: write a prompt describing how to summarize each call.
  • Success Evaluation: write a prompt and pick a rubric - such as a 1-10 scale, a checklist, or a simple pass/fail - so each call is scored consistently.

steps.title: Extract Structured Data
steps.content:
1. In Structured Data, add a prompt and build a Data Schema of the properties you want captured (for example name, order number, or intent).
  2. iMash extracts those fields from the transcript and includes them in the POST to your Server URL.

steps.title: Send It to an Automation
steps.content:
1. In Intelligence Center → Automation, create a flow that starts with a Catch Webhook trigger and copy its URL.
  2. Paste that URL as the Server URL above.
  3. Now call results can flow straight into an automation - emailing a summary, updating a sheet, or calling another API.

metaDescription: Configure iMash Webhooks Post Processing: summarize calls, score success, extract structured JSON data, and POST everything to your server or an automation.
